mapper.select:
SELECT id, se_heater_equip_code, se_heater_name, se_heater_type, se_heater_spec, se_heater_area, se_heater_design_p, se_heater_design_t, se_heater_medium, se_heater_material, se_heater_install_pos, se_heater_in_service, se_heater_inspect_cycle, se_heater_last_inspect, se_heater_next_inspect, se_heater_inspect_result, se_heater_clean_cycle, se_heater_last_clean, se_heater_next_clean, se_heater_fouling_rate, se_heater_energy_eff, se_heater_maintain_record, se_heater_fault_record, se_heater_operator, se_heater_create_time, se_heater_update_time, se_heater_status, se_heater_factory, se_heater_reserve1, se_heater_reserve2, se_heater_reserve3 FROM se_heater
and se_heater_equip_code like CONCAT( #{queryParams.seHeaterEquipCode}, '%')
and se_heater_name like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seHeaterName}, '%')
and se_heater_status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seHeaterStatus}, '%')
and se_heater_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.seHeaterFactory}, '%')

SELECT id, se_heater_equip_code, se_heater_name, se_heater_type, se_heater_spec, se_heater_area, se_heater_design_p, se_heater_design_t, se_heater_medium, se_heater_material, se_heater_install_pos, se_heater_in_service, se_heater_inspect_cycle, se_heater_last_inspect, se_heater_next_inspect, se_heater_inspect_result, se_heater_clean_cycle, se_heater_last_clean, se_heater_next_clean, se_heater_fouling_rate, se_heater_energy_eff, se_heater_maintain_record, se_heater_fault_record, se_heater_operator, se_heater_create_time, se_heater_update_time, se_heater_status, se_heater_factory, se_heater_reserve1, se_heater_reserve2, se_heater_reserve3 FROM se_heater
and se_heater_equip_code like CONCAT( #{seHeaterEquipCode}, '%')
and se_heater_name like CONCAT ('%',#{seHeaterName}, '%')
and se_heater_status like CONCAT ('%',#{seHeaterStatus}, '%')
and se_heater_factory like CONCAT ('%',#{seHeaterFactory}, '%')
